creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
KBubbles is another KDE game. See DESCR + website. I
was unable to get the documentation to install correctly
for some reason. Perhaps one of the folks who knows .po*
files better than I do can fix this. I'm sure it's quite
trivial to do that. But I wanted this in before 4.0-REL.

How-To-Repeat: 
Use the shar below to import the new port to the tree.
